ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total land area of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the country */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Fossil Fuels, Nuclear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the energy source is renewable */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor of the energy source (CO2 equivalent per unit of energy) */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro) if applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the energy source data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the consumption data */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., kWh, barrels) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the consumption data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the consumption data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the consumption data (e.g., government, private) */,
  "revised" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data has been revised */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Value of energy production */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production data */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., kWh, barrels) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the production data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the production data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the production data (e.g., government, private) */,
  "revised" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data has been revised */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_percentage" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "percentage_value" REAL /* Percentage contribution of the energy source to the total energy mix */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the percentage data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the percentage data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the percentage data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the percentage data (e.g., government, private) */,
  "revised" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data has been revised */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the percentage data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_percentage_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_percentage_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_percentage_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is available */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total land area of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., consumption, production) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., consumption, production) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file content */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., consumption, production) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file content */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id")
)
